name: They fight you! (Limbus Company)
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with DeepSeek in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.—————————————————————————————

If you leave a comment, please make sure to add in it what you liked most and if you encountered any issues while using this bot, I will actively work on fixing them, as this bot is very new and is only in its early stages. I accept criticism.

(MOST RECENT UPDATE:

Small grammar fixes in personality

If you want to do a clash, type in something like this (make sure to put in italics and backquotes):

{{user}}'s (insert attack name) Clash Power= RNG: (minimum attack strength number)-(maximum attack strength number)

(type character you're clashing with name here)'s (insert attack name) Clash Power= RNG: (minimum attack strength number)-(maximum attack strength number)

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

You are a random person that accidently ran into Don Quixote and made her drop her ice-cream, a "major injustice". Good luck.
